title: CandleRuntime activation hooks (layer-wise capture + injection)
goal: Implement CandleSteeringHook providing layer-wise activation capture (read residual stream at any layer) and injection (add a steering vector during forward pass). This is the substrate every hook-requiring technique (INF-3 activation steering, INF-4 refusal vector, INF-5 CAA) depends on per AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/hooks.rs with HookRegistry, HookHandle, CandleSteeringHook impl of SteeringHookOps; candle Tensor-graph hook insertion at chosen layer indices.
unblock_conditions: MT-065 SteeringHookOps trait + MT-081 CandleRuntime scaffolding merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER + AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.c/d/e: CandleRuntime is the hook substrate. candle-core does not have a TransformerLens-style register_hook API out-of-the-box; the implementation pattern (per RW-3 research): wrap the model's forward function so that after each transformer block forward call, a registered closure inspects (capture) and optionally mutates (inject) the residual stream tensor. HookRegistry: `HashMap<LayerIndex, Vec<HookCallback>>` where HookCallback is `Box<dyn Fn(&mut Tensor) -> Result<(), CandleError> + Send + Sync>`. Forward wrapper: each layer i in 0..n_layers calls `block.forward(&hidden)` then iterates registry[i] callbacks. capture(spec): registers a one-shot callback per layer in spec.layers that clones the tensor into a buffer keyed by (layer_id, batch_idx); runs forward pass; collects buffer; returns CaptureResult. register_vector(vec): stores vec in HookRegistry under vec.layer; on subsequent generate calls, a long-lived callback adds vec.values * vec.intensity to the tensor at vec.hook_point. set_active(ids): toggles which registered vectors are active. unregister(id): drops the registry entry. HookPoint enum: ResidStream (residual stream after block forward), MlpOut (just after MLP), AttnOut (just after attention). For ResidStream: hook fires after `block.forward`. For MlpOut/AttnOut: need to instrument inside the block (decompose forward into attn + mlp halves). Some candle-transformers models expose this decomposition; for ones that don't, only ResidStream is supported (return CapabilityNotSupported for other hook points). HookRegistry per ModelId so concurrent generate calls don't interfere. Tests (env-gated): load a small Llama via candle-transformers, capture residual stream at layer 5 on a fixed prompt, assert shape [seq_len, hidden_dim]; register a steering vector of zeros at layer 5 with intensity 1.0, generate, assert output IDENTICAL to base; register with random vector intensity 1.0, generate, assert output DIFFERS from base.
risk_if_missed: INF-3/INF-4/INF-5 have no hook substrate; cluster C.6/C.7/C.8 cannot land.
validator_focus: Identity test (zero vector hook -> output unchanged) is the correctness gate; HookRegistry per-ModelId isolation prevents cross-talk; capability for non-ResidStream hook points correctly reported.

minimum_controls: Zero-vector identity test (output unchanged) is the correctness gate.
Per-ModelId HookRegistry isolation (concurrent generate cannot leak hooks).
Non-supported HookPoint returns CapabilityNotSupported (not silent no-op).
